name: Kourabiedes

ingredients.item: In a large mixing bowl, beat the butter with a hand mixer for about 10 to 15minutesutes until it’s light and fluffy. TIP: Do not toss out the butter wrappers; you’ll use them later to grease the Cookie baking sheets. Combine the egg yolks, lemon juice, and Ouzo; beat for 1minutesute. Finally, add in the baking powder, baking soda, vanilla powder, and powdered sugar. Blend the batter with the hand mixer for 5minutesutes.
In another mixing bowl, add in the flour, then pour in the batter. Mix/knead manually by hand—about 20minutesutes. Cover the biscuit dough with a moistened tea towel.
Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C) on the convection setting. (See
at back of book if you have a conventional oven.)
Roll out the dough into round, long, or crescent shapes. Place onto greased baking trays, and bake for 35 to 45minutesutes, or until lightly golden.
Remove the biscuits from the oven, place them on a sizeable, clean surface to cool for 1 hour. Sift powdered sugar over top until well-covered.
Store the kourabiedes in an airtight container. Serve with coffee or tea.
